name: Lemon Sponge Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 each Lemon, juice & rind                 3 Tablespoons Flour
1 1/2 cups Hot milk                            1 Egg, 9 inches pie shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar.
2. Add egg yolks and beat well.
3. Add flour, salt, lemon juice and grated rind.
4. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Pour into unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 45 minutes.
